title: Light Combat Suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Light_Combat_Suit.jpg|thumb|150px]]
The '''light combat suit''' was a lighter version of the popular [[combat suit]] that saw extensive use during the years of the [[Jedi Civil War]] and [[Dark Wars]]. It was best suited for when the wearer faced a minimal threat of attack and offered little protection in the way of [[Blaster/Legends|blasterfire]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
